_comment: ConvoHub custom Slack app manifest. After deploying the slackEvents Cloud Function, replace REQUEST_URL_PLACEHOLDER below with the deployed URL (e.g. https://us-central1-convo-hub-71514.cloudfunctions.net/slackEvents) and paste this whole JSON into https://api.slack.com/apps → 'Create New App' → 'From an app manifest'.

display_information.name: ConvoHub
display_information.description: Pulls inbound Slack messages into the ConvoHub agent dashboard.
